title: Durability Warning
description: A mod that warns the player of nearly breaking tools and armor.
body:
# Durability Warning

A Fabric mod that warns you when your active tool or Elytra are about to break.

## Features

- **Visual Warning System** - Get alerted before your tools or equipment break
- **Blinking Red Border** - A prominent red border flashes around your screen when durability is critically low
- **On-Screen Warning Message** - Clear text notification indicating which item needs attention
- **Tool Monitoring** - Tracks durability of the tool in your main hand
- **Elytra Monitoring** - Monitors your Elytra's condition while flying
- **Configurable Options** - Toggle the blinking border and warning message on/off

## How It Works

The mod continuously monitors your equipped items and triggers warnings when durability drops below 10% of maximum. This gives you enough time to switch to a backup item or repair your gear before it breaks completely.
